mapper.select:
SELECT id, supplier_category AS supplierCategory, supplier_code AS supplierCode, supplier_name AS supplierName, address, contact_person AS contactPerson, contact_id AS contactId, contact_email AS contactEmail, fax, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM supplier_manage
AND supplier_code = #{supplierCode}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO supplier_manage
supplier_category, supplier_code, supplier_name, address, contact_person, contact_id, contact_email, fax, creator_id, creator_username, creator_name, created_at,
#{supplierCategory}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{address}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactId}, #{contactEmail}, #{fax}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorUsername}, #{creatorName}, #{createdAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT id, supplier_category AS supplierCategory, supplier_code AS supplierCode, supplier_name AS supplierName, address, contact_person AS contactPerson, contact_id AS contactId, contact_email AS contactEmail, fax, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM supplier_manage WHERE id = #{id}
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}

SELECT id, supplier_category AS supplierCategory, supplier_code AS supplierCode, supplier_name AS supplierName, address, contact_person AS contactPerson, contact_id AS contactId, contact_email AS contactEmail, fax, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM supplier_manage
AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
AND supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierCode}, '%')
AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
AND supplier_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierCategory}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, supplier_category AS supplierCategory, supplier_code AS supplierCode, supplier_name AS supplierName, address, contact_person AS contactPerson, contact_id AS contactId, contact_email AS contactEmail, fax, creator_id AS creatorId, creator_username AS creatorUsername, creator_name AS creatorName, created_at AS createdAt FROM supplier_manage WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} AND creator_id = #{creatorId} LIMIT 1
